You unload the heavy pots and the party's status returns to normal!
Collect three types of water and come back to me. You can collect
them with the pots over on the side.
This pot's really big and heavy. Once it's full of water, it'll weigh
You'll be fighting at a disadvantage while carrying the water.
Gladiators are coming to test their skills despite the large number
of dangerous monsters in the area.
Be careful. They'll attack you even while dripping with sweat.
They're a savage, crazed, stinky lot.
Obtained a Pot of Red Water!

Obtained a Pot of Green Water!
The pot's really heavy. Your Defense will be lowered until you
There are three types of water in the desert area. You can refer to
the pots behind me to get an idea of what you're looking for.
You can get one type of water from each oasis. Collect all three,
then report to the soldier at the exit.
There are some pretty massive monsters on the loose in this area.
The same kind that were rampaging backstage the other day.
If they see you, run like crazy. Though we won't complain if you
manage to take some down, if you even can.
Someone built a hot spring right in the middle of the desert area!
Strong monsters have started showing up because of it!
This is the worst! Who thought putting that thing here was a good
idea!? Are those bigwigs thick in the head!?
There are four teams ahead of you. Be careful they don't jump you.
The battle for the water's still ongoing. It could be a good chance to
gain some experience if you need it.
Oh, you made it here! We've memorized the surrounding terrain!
Now we'll be able to take you straight here from the world map!
Need a high-speed lift to another country?
